chain_of_thought: Mixed-script homograph check incorrectly includes the URL scheme, causing any non-ASCII URL (IDN) to be rejected as a potential attack, making the Punycode normalization unreachable.

show_preferences uses manual signal tracking for LanguageManager signals instead of registering PreferencesDialog as a controller or using connect_tracked on the dialog itself. While it attempts manual disconnection on close, it's inconsistent with the rest of the architecture.
